title: selenicereus calcaratus
intro: Selenicereus calcaratus, also known as Night-Blooming Cereus or Pincushion Cactus, is a species of cactus in the genus Selenicereus, characterized by its unique appearance and fragrant flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Selenicereus calcaratus include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and alleviating anxiety and stress. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
